article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 23, 2023 (BSS) - Some 55 Bangladeshi companies are going to showcase their products at the leading global consumer goods show, Ambiente 2023, to be held in Frankfurt, Germany from February 3 to 7.

More than 4,460 exhibitors from over 92 countries are expected to be presenting trends and innovations for the coming business season in the trade fair, said a press release here today.

'Export Promotion Bureau (EPB)' has been providing subsidised stalls to increase the exports of handicra

llm_connections.evidence_quote: has been providing subsidised stalls to increase the exports of handicrafts, decorative items and kitchen accessories
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly states EPB's subsidised stalls 'increase the exports of handicrafts, decorative items and kitchen accessories', which refers to raising the volume of goods Bangladesh sends internationally.

verification.quote_best_match: has been providing subsidised stalls to increase the exports of handicrafts, decorative items and kitchen accessories
verification.judge_reasoning: The article explicitly states: "EPB has been providing subsidised stalls to increase the exports of handicrafts, decorative items and kitchen accessories by allowing small and medium exporters to exhibit...", which directly asserts a causal intent and applies to Bangladesh-level exports of those goods.
